title: Thickness mode transducers and related devices and methods
abstract: Transducers are provided including a piezoelectric block having first and second opposing surfaces; a first non-piezoelectric layer on the first surface of the piezoelectric block, the first layer including a low density material having a first thickness; and a second non-piezoelectric layer on the second surface of the piezoelectric block, the second layer including a high density material having a second thickness, the second thickness being different from the first thickness and being at least two times the first thickness. Related devices and methods are also provided.
claims: Claims THAT WHICH IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A transducer comprising: a piezoelectric block having first and second opposing surfaces; a first non-piezoelectric layer on the first surface of the piezoelectric block, the first layer including a low density material having a first thickness; and a second non-piezoelectric layer on the second surface of the piezoelectric block, the second layer including a high density material having a second thickness, the second thickness being different from the first thickness and being at least two times the first thickness. 2. The transducer of Claim 1 : wherein the low density material comprises aluminium; and wherein the high density material comprises one of steel and brass. 3. The transducer of Claim 2: wherein the first layer is a front layer of the transducer and has a thickness of from about 1.00 mm to about 2.00 mm; and wherein the second layer is a back layer of the transducer and has a thickness of from about 2.0 mm to about 5.0 mm. 4. The transducer of Claim 1, wherein the piezoelectric block comprises a soft PZT material selected from one of grade P5 A material and P5H material and wherein the piezoelectric block has a thickness of from about 1.00mm to about 3.00 mm. 5. The transducer of Claim 1, wherein a resonant frequency of the transducer is about 167 kHz and dimensions of the first layer are 7x7x1.5 mm; dimensions of the second layer are 7x7x4; and dimensions of the piezoelectric block are 5x5x3. 6. The transducer of Claim 1, wherein a resonant frequency of the transducer is about 167 kHz and dimensions of the first layer are 7x7x2 mm; dimensions of the second layer are 7x7x5 mm; and dimensions of the piezoelectric block are 5x5x2.39 mm. 7. The transducer of Claim 1, wherein a resonant frequency of the transducer is about 400kHz and dimensions of the first layer are 5x5x1 mm; dimensions of the second layer are 5x5x2 mm; and dimensions of the piezoelectric block are 4x4x1 mm. 8. The transducer of Claim 1, wherein the first and second layers are coupled to the first and second surfaces of the piezoelectric block, respectively, using an adhesive. 9. The transducer of Claim 8, wherein electrical contact between the piezoelectric block and the first and second layers is obtained using the adhesive and without a wire soldered between the piezoelectric block and the first and second layers. 10. The transducer of Claim 1, wherein the transducer is an ultrasonic transducer configured for one of a gas meter, a water meter and a heat meter. 11. The transducer of Claim 1, further comprising an acoustic matching layer on a surface of the first layer opposite the piezoelectric block. 12. An electronic device, comprising: at least one transducer, the at least one transducer comprising: a piezoelectric block having first and second opposing surfaces; a first non-piezoelectric layer on the first surface of the piezoelectric block, the first layer including a low density material having a first thickness; and a second non-piezoelectric layer on the second surface of the piezoelectric block, the second layer including a high density material having a second thickness, the second thickness being different from the first thickness and being at least two times the first thickness. 13. The device of Claim 12: wherein the low density material comprises aluminium; and wherein the high density material comprises one of steel and brass. 14. The device of Claim 13 : wherein the first layer is a front layer of the transducer and has a thickness of from about 1.00 mm to about 2.00 mm; and wherein the second layer is a back layer of the transducer and has a thickness of from about 2.0 mm to about 5.0 mm. 15. The device of Claim 12, wherein the piezoelectric block comprises a soft PZT material selected from one of grade P5A material and P5H material. 16. The device of Claim 15, wherein the piezoelectric block has a thickness of from about 1.00mm to about 3.00 mm. 17. The device of Claim 12, wherein the first and second layers are coupled to the first and second surfaces of the piezoelectric block, respectively, using an adhesive. 18. The device of Claim 17, wherein electrical contact between the piezoelectric block and the first and second layers is obtained using the adhesive and without a wire soldered between the piezoelectric block and the first and second layers. 19. The device of Claim 12, wherein the device comprises a plurality of transducers and is one of a gas meter, a heat meter and a water meter. 20. A method of fabricating a transducer, comprising: providing a piezoelectric block having first and second surfaces, the first surface being spaced apart from and opposite the second surface; bonding a non-piezoelectric first layer including a low density material to a first surface of the piezoelectric block using an adhesive; bonding a non-piezoelectric second layer including a high density material to a second surface of the piezoelectric block using the adhesive to provide a bonded structure; and curing the bonded structure. 21. The method of Claim 20, wherein bonding the first layer is preceded by providing the first layer including the low density material and having a first thickness; and wherein bonding the second layer is preceded by providing the second layer including the high density material and having a second thickness, the second thickness being different from the first thickness and being at least two times the first thickness. 22. The method of Claim 21 : wherein providing the first layer comprises providing a first layer comprising aluminium; and wherein providing the second layer comprises providing a second layer comprising one of steel and brass. 23. The method of Claim 22: wherein the first layer is a front layer of the transducer and has a thickness of from about 1.00 mm to about 2.00 mm; wherein the second layer is a back layer of the transducer and has a thickness of from about 2.0 mm to about 5.0 mm; and wherein the piezoelectric block has a thickness of from about 1.00mm to about 3.00 mm. 24. The method of Claim 20, further comprising providing electrical contact between the piezoelectric block and the first and second layers using the adhesive and without a wire soldered between the piezoelectric block and the first and second layers. 25. The method of Claim 20, wherein curing the bonded structure comprises curing the bonded structure under heat and pressure in a chamber.
